title: new york fed / household debt / credit conditions | Data Release Other | New York Fed Releases New Report, Web Page on Household Cred...
summary: The New York Fed released a Quarterly Report on Household Debt and Credit showing households reduced aggregate consumer indebtedness by 6.4% from the 2008 peak through Q2 2010. The delinquency rate on household debt declined for the first time since early 2006, from 11.9% to 11.2%. However, bankruptcies rose 34% in Q2 2010, with significant regional variation showing Arizona, California, Florida, and Nevada experiencing higher-than-average delinquency and foreclosure rates.
